description: Semantic search and knowledge graph for your Wall notes from Claude Code and MCP clients.
name: io.github.xjpru/xentropy-notes

environmentVariables.description: Xentropy API base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:3001/api. Must include the /api prefix.
environmentVariables.name: XEN_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: API token (Supabase access JWT) for static authentication. Obtain via 'xen-notes-mcp login --email YOU --password X --show-token'.
environmentVariables.name: XEN_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Refresh token for automatic token rotation. Only needed if using static token auth without interactive login.
environmentVariables.name: XEN_REFRESH_TOKEN

title: Xentropy Notes — Memory Layer for AI
